ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate mentioned in the tweet */,
  "relevant_yn" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the tweet is relevant to the campaign */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "subject_matter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject matter discussed in the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "tweet_created" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet_location" TEXT /* Location mentioned in the tweet */,
  "tweet_coord" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet (if available) */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is replying to, if applicable */,
  "quote_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is quoting, if applicable */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been quoted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter Web App, Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "user_follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_timezone FOREIGN KEY ("user_timezone") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_tweet_location FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_sentiment FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_subject_matter_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_matter_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name or handle of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the user */,
  "user_follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "user_following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "user_account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_verification_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the candidate's campaign (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's official website */,
  "candidate_social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the candidate's social media profiles */,
  "candidate_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's image or profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_matter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject matter */,
  "subject_matter_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject matter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the subject matter (e.g., Politics, Economy) */,
  "subject_matter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subject matter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_matter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* A numerical score representing the intensity of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_confidences" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "candidate_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the candidate mentioned in the tweet */,
  "relevant_yn_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the relevance of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the sentiment of the tweet */,
  "subject_matter_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the subject matter discussed in the tweet */,
  "like_count_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the like count */,
  "quote_count_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level for the quote count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gold_standards" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "candidate_gold" INTEGER /* Gold standard candidate mentioned in the tweet */,
  "relevant_yn_gold" INTEGER /* Gold standard relevance of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_gold" TEXT /* Gold standard sentiment of the tweet */,
  "subject_matter_gold" INTEGER /* Gold standard subject matter discussed in the tweet */,
  "like_count_gold" INTEGER /* Gold standard like count */,
  "quote_count_gold" INTEGER /* Gold standard quote count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the location (if available) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description or additional details about the location */,
  "location_population" INTEGER /* Population of the location (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timezone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the timezone */,
  "offset" TEXT /* Offset from UTC */,
  "timezone_description" TEXT /* Description or additional details about the timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag used in the tweet */,
  "hashtag_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Viewer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
